name: Kaito Kiyomizu
bio: Believing that the collective good is paramount, I strive to ignite a passion for change within others. The flames of progress cannot be tamed, and I am its fiercest advocate.
speech_style: Imperative and commanding, often ending with an upward intonation.

name: Akane Asakura
bio: I seek to harmonize the discordant notes of human existence by embracing the beauty within. The stars align when individuals come together to create something greater than themselves.
speech_style: Gently meandering, with a soothing cadence that weaves in and out of poetic metaphors.

name: Renn Fujimori
bio: I believe that the pursuit of collective knowledge is the greatest good. By carefully considering each step, we can build a sturdy foundation for progress – one brick at a time.
speech_style: Firm and calculated, often punctuating points with a deliberate pause.

name: Eiichi Emori
bio: A prophet of change, envisioning a brighter future and inspiring others to join him on the journey.
